spans=[]
# find markers occurrences
s_raw=s
def extract_between(open_marker,close_marker):
    i=s_raw.find(open_marker)
    j=s_raw.find(close_marker,i+1)
    if i==-1 or j==-1:
        return None
    start=i+len(open_marker)
    text=s_raw[start:j]
    # trim edge chars per rules: whitespace, newlines, quotes, punctuation Arabic punctuation etc and tatweel
    import re
    # define chars to trim
    trim_chars = r'^[\s\)\]\}\>\<\"\'«»\u0640\،\؛\:\.\,\!\?\…]+|[\s\(\[\{\>\<\"\'«»\u0640\،\؛\:\.\,\!\?\…]+$'
    # But need to trim only small; use loop
    orig=text
    # trim from both ends iteratively
    while len(text)>0 and text[0] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[1:]
    while len(text)>0 and text[-1] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[:-1]
    # find start index of text in s_raw
    idx = s_raw.find(text,start)
    return (idx, idx+len(text), text)

a1=extract_between("(aya_start)","(aya_end)")
h1=extract_between("(hadith_start)","(hadith_end)")
a2=extract_between("(aya_start)","(aya_end)",)
a1,a2,h1

results=[]
pos=0
while True:
    i=s_raw.find("(aya_start)",pos)
    if i==-1: break
    j=s_raw.find("(aya_end)",i)
    if j==-1: break
    start=i+len("(aya_start)")
    text=s_raw[start:j]
    # trim edges
    while len(text)>0 and text[0] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[1:]
    while len(text)>0 and text[-1] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[:-1]
    idx=s_raw.find(text,start)
    results.append(("Aya",idx,idx+len(text),text))
    pos=j+len("(aya_end)")
# hadiths
pos=0
while True:
    i=s_raw.find("(hadith_start)",pos)
    if i==-1: break
    j=s_raw.find("(hadith_end)",i)
    if j==-1: break
    start=i+len("(hadith_start)")
    text=s_raw[start:j]
    while len(text)>0 and text[0] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[1:]
    while len(text)>0 and text[-1] in " \n\t\r()[]{}<>\"'«»\u0640،؛:.,!?…":
        text=text[:-1]
    idx=s_raw.find(text,start)
    results.append(("Hadeeth",idx,idx+len(text),text))
    pos=j+len("(hadith_end)")
